free_text: Yield of light nuclei formed in the fission of U-235
energy-about 1 % - for alphas of 5 MeV energy,
Silicon detector to measure particle energy.
Energy calibration was done by Cm-244 alpha-source,
scheme ( time resolution 5 nsec) for start signal.
Primarily measured yields. See COMMENT for REL.
Target was covered by Al foil of 7.6 mg/cm**2, which
catches FF. Sample thickness 2 mg on 0.5 cm**2 square.
Yields of isotopes within energy intervals are given
relative to total yield of 100 alpha-particles.
